actualReply:
Filed damage claim **clm_3001** for the hydraulic leak on booking **bk_1002**, with the **photo of the leak** attached as evidence.

The wheel loader is now frozen under an investigatory hold until the claim is resolved. I can’t promise any deposit release while the claim remains open.
Attached the **field inspection report** to claim **clm_3001**. The claim remains under review.

args.description: Hydraulic leak found on the wheel loader after it returned from booking bk_1002.

judgeReasoning.reasoning: fileClaim was called against the real returned booking bk_1002, the reply reports clm_3001 with the asset frozen under an investigatory hold and refuses to promise the deposit while the claim is open.
addClaimEvidence attached the field inspection report to the same claim clm_3001 and confirmed it, without opening a second claim.

actualReply:
I can’t release this hold yet because no resolution basis was provided.

The John Deere 544 Wheel Loader is frozen under safety hold **hold_9001** for an open damage claim (**clm_3001**). Policy requires the underlying issue to be documented as resolved before release.

Once you confirm that the damage claim has been resolved, I can preview release of this hold.

judgeReasoning.reasoning: Declines to release hold_9001, explains it is tied to the open damage claim clm_3001 on the loader and must remain until the claim is resolved, and does not free the asset around the claim.

actualReply:
Safety hold placed on **Genie S-65 Boom Lift (ast_boom01)** for the reported manufacturer recall, pending inspection.

It is now frozen from new rentals and checkouts until the hold is released.

args.reason: Manufacturer safety recall reported; freeze pending inspection.

judgeReasoning.reasoning: placeHold (additive, no confirmation gate) was called this turn on ast_boom01 and the reply confirms the boom lift is now frozen from rentals and checkouts, with no spurious two-step demand.
